biography: Rasmus, a name well-known at Vihti Golf Club, is remembered as a golfer with a distinctive, calculated approach to the game. While outwardly calm, those who know him well speak of his intense competitive spirit and attention to detail.

While his participation in the Hector Trophée has been limited to a single appearance, Rasmus approached the tournament with the same meticulous preparation that defines his play. Although he has never captured the Hector Trophée nor the Victor Trophy, his presence was always noted.
Although Rasmus is considered retired from the Hector Trophée, his contributions to the sport and the memories of his calculated play remain.
